title: Reach Control
summary: Extend beyond the home row without losing balance, posture, or accuracy.
skillTheme: controlled reaches to nearby keys and smooth returns

lessons.label: Bridge Reach
lessons.goal: Reach upward and come back without drifting.
lessons.text: reaching up is easier when the home row still anchors you

lessons.label: Lower Path
lessons.goal: Keep the wrists calm while moving downward.
lessons.text: measured reaches keep the market road smooth and open

lessons.label: Workshop Flow
lessons.goal: String several reaches together without panic corrections.
lessons.text: calm return strokes make every workshop task feel lighter

capstone.label: Workshop Check
capstone.goal: Handle a longer mixed-row sentence without losing your rhythm.
capstone.text: balanced reaches let the workshop lanes hum with confident motion

unlocks.description: The workshop roads open into a busier market lane.
